headline: Welltower CFO Timothy McHugh sets U.S. pay record at $167M
summary: Timothy McHugh's 2025 compensation surpasses the previous record set by Tesla's CFO and leaves his nearest S&P 500 peers more than $100 million behind

raw.headline: Welltower CFO Timothy McHugh sets U.S. pay record at $167M
raw.summary: Timothy McHugh's 2025 compensation surpasses the previous record set by Tesla's CFO and leaves his nearest S&P 500 peers more than $100 million behind

headline: Welltower Announces Date of Second Quarter 2026 Earnings Release, Conference Call and Webcast
summary: Welltower® Inc. (NYSE: WELL) today announced it will release second quarter 2026 financial results after the close of trading on the New York Stock Exchange on Monday, July 27, 2026. The Company will host a conference call and webcast on Tuesday, July 28, 2026, at 9:00 a.m. ET to discuss these results. The Company's earnings release will be available in the Investor Relations section of the Company's website.
